conflict: In the aftermath of the raid, grief, guilt, pain, and exhaustion threaten to turn the group inward just when visibility is becoming unavoidable.
consequence: Lin chooses public testimony, and Mira and Tavi stop treating secrecy as their primary form of care.
must_land_beats: Use hospital and rubble spaces to show residue of violence without melodrama.
Force Mira and Tavi to name the shape of Tavi's complicity plainly.
Make Lin's choice to testify feel brave, frightening, and self-authoring.
End with a public course of action no one can safely undo.
pressure_source: In the aftermath of the raid, grief, guilt, pain, and exhaustion threaten to turn the group inward just when visibility is becoming unavoidable.
state_shift: Lin chooses public testimony, and Mira and Tavi stop treating secrecy as their primary form of care.
